scope: Phase 3 UMI - analysis assumptions for D4DJ Groovy Mix

notes.combo_definition: lane-based hit objects with scratch gestures on beat-aligned timeline

tips.rationale: D4DJ charts provide clear lane structure and distinctive scratch mechanics, enabling deterministic timing, lane control, and scratch-handling tips when processed by Phase 4.

table.name: adapter-validator canonical kinds alignment
table.expected: All emitted note kinds must be within schema.canonical_kinds

table.name: lane-based structural invariants
table.expected: Lane ids must map to positive canonical lanes with monotonic timing

table.name: tips enablement gate
table.expected: Tips generation must respect Phase 4 gating

consistency_checks.notes: D4DJ consistency checks follow the Bandori anchor: enforce Phase-3 structural scope, lane-pattern geometry, and Phase-4 gating rather than gameplay semantics or DB parity.
